query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A streetlight fixture centered in the frame emits a bright yellow-white glow against a completely black background. The rectangular upper housing is intensely illuminated, while the tapered lower section and supporting pole fade into near-total shadow. The light source dominates the composition, surrounded by darkness on all sides.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A streetlight fixture centered in the frame emits a bright yellow-white glow against a completely black background. The rectangular upper housing is intensely illuminated, revealing a dark accumulation of grime and debris on the interior surface of the lens. The tapered lower section and supporting pole fade into near-total shadow, emphasizing the neglected and weathered state of the fixture.
